features.name: interface modport connection in concatenation
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation with modport connections where output signals from a master modport are connected via concatenation on a module's input port
features.snippet: test test_inst (.a({data_in, test_if_in.a, test_if_in.b, test_if_in.c, test_if_in.d}), .b({data_out, test_if_out.a, test_if_out.b, test_if_out.c, test_if_out.d}));

features.name: signal in concatenation with modport outputs
features.description: Code should include a signal that appears in a concatenation alongside interface modport output signals where driver analysis is performed
features.snippet:
logic [20-1 : 0] data_out;
test test_inst (.b({data_out, test_if_out.a, test_if_out.b, test_if_out.c, test_if_out.d}));

features.name: bidirectional modport interface connection
features.description: Code should include an interface with both slave and master modports connected to different module instances, causing Verilator's driver tracking to misattribute drivers
